description: Currently in my 5th semester. Relevant coursework: Programming II, Algorithmic Complexity, Databases.

Led a team of 6 students to recreate the Pizzatron 3000 game from Club Penguin using object-oriented programming in Java. Applied agile methodologies, Git version control, and basic UI design principles.
Developed console-based applications to apply OOP and data structures. Implemented sorting algorithms and file-handling operations. Used Visual Studio Code and Git for debugging and version control.
Technical certification in computer equipment maintenance and repair from the Servicio Nacional de Aprendizaje (SENA), Paz de Ariporo, Casanare.
